description_long: This building features a prominent central dome, characteristic of planetariums, with a metallic sheen and a cylindrical base. Attached to the dome are several interconnected structures, including a large arched roof section, a flat-roofed wing with multiple doors, and a shaded canopy area supported by poles. The exterior surfaces are primarily smooth and metallic, with some sections covered in dark, matte roofing material. The building sits on a broad, paved base that extends outward, providing ample space for visitors and possibly outdoor exhibits. The overall design is functional yet modern, with clean lines and a focus on the central dome as the architectural focal point. The structure appears to be purpose-built for astronomical observation and public education.
description: A modern planetarium building with a large central dome, arched and flat-roofed wings, and a shaded canopy area, all set on a broad paved base.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance area, the large dome, and the arched roof section to the left.
description_view_1: This rear view shows the back of the dome, the flat-roofed wing, and the extended paved area behind the building.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the dome's cylindrical base, the canopy area, and the arched roof section.
description_view_3: This view displays the arched roof section in the foreground, with the dome and other building wings receding into the background.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance features a set of double doors beneath a wide, curved awning, with a paved approach and possible steps leading up to the entryway.
